summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Create Duel functionality for TG Mini App. Fixed critical frontend data structure mismatch and verified full API integration.
passed_tests: Backend API POST /api/duels creates duel successfully (201 status)
Backend API GET /api/duels returns duels list with proper data structure
Backend API GET /api/duels/open returns open duels correctly
Backend API GET /api/duels/summary returns user summary with all required fields
Frontend TG Mini App /tg/duels loads without errors after data structure fix
Create Duel button is present and properly disabled when wallet not connected
Filter tabs (All, Open, Live, My Duels) are all present and functional
Duels list displays correctly with creator wallet, sides, and stake amounts
Wallet connection modal opens with MetaMask, Trust Wallet, OKX, and Coinbase options
TG Create Duel Modal component loads without errors
All backend health checks and onchain functionality working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Critical error fixed, wallet connection working, modal accessible)
